post.description:
Create attorney for POA.
Logic:
- If poa_id is empty, check if active POA exists for current_user, if not create
- Create attorney if email is not present in attorney table
- Insert poa_id and attorney_id relationship

The attorney_poa_id is the ID of the AttorneyPOA entry, not the attorney itself.

Create or update an AHD Person.
If 'id' is provided in the payload, it will update; otherwise, it will create.

Retrieve vault preference for a user.

Args:
    current_user: Current authenticated user

Returns:
    CustomResponse with the vault preference

Retrieve all vault assets for the authenticated user with associated files.

Args:
    current_user: Current authenticated user

Returns:
    CustomResponse with list of assets and their documents

post.description:
Create or update a vault asset for the authenticated user.
If id is provided in the request, it will update the existing asset.
If id is not provided, it will create a new asset.

Args:
    asset_dto: VaultAssetCreate DTO (with optional id for update)
    current_user: Current authenticated user

Returns:
    CustomResponse with created/updated asset details

get.description:
Retrieve a specific vault asset by ID.

Args:
    asset_id: UUID of the asset
    current_user: Current authenticated user

Returns:
    CustomResponse with asset details

put.description:
Update a vault asset.

Args:
    asset_id: UUID of the asset
    asset_dto: VaultAssetUpdate DTO with fields to update
    current_user: Current authenticated user

Returns:
    CustomResponse with updated asset details

delete.description:
Delete a vault asset.

Args:
    asset_id: UUID of the asset
    current_user: Current authenticated user

Returns:
    CustomResponse with deletion status

post.description:
Upload a file to vault with encryption.
If asset_id is not provided, a new VaultAsset will be created automatically.

Args:
    file: File to upload
    asset_id: UUID of the vault asset (optional - will create new asset if not provided)
    current_user: Current authenticated user

Returns:
    CustomResponse with uploaded file details and asset_id

get.description:
Download a file from vault.

Args:
    asset_id: UUID of the vault asset
    file_id: UUID of the vault file
    current_user: Current authenticated user

Returns:
    File content for download

Get vault file metadata without downloading.

Args:
    asset_id: UUID of the vault asset
    file_id: UUID of the vault file
    current_user: Current authenticated user

Returns:
    CustomResponse with file metadata

delete.description:
Delete a vault file.

Args:
    asset_id: UUID of the vault asset
    file_id: UUID of the vault file
    current_user: Current authenticated user

Returns:
    CustomResponse with deletion status

get.description:
List all files for a vault asset.

Args:
    asset_id: UUID of the vault asset
    current_user: Current authenticated user

Returns:
    CustomResponse with list of files
